positive_examples: Can you check this diff before I commit it?
I'm about to push this branch, can you scan for secrets first?
Is it safe to paste this log output into the PR description?
negative_examples: Can you refactor this function to use async/await?

rollback.method: Remove "secret-safety" from every profiles/*.json skills array, then delete skills/secret-safety/. The skill has no side effects beyond invoking scan-secrets.sh on demand, so no state migration is needed.
